name: property managers managing 10-50 rental units tool
description: For property managers managing 10-50 rental units, inefficient tenant screening causes potential vacancies. We automate tenant screening instead of manual tenant screening and lease management.
problem_solved: inefficient tenant screening and lease renewal processes
